results.rendered_html: yamalārjuna or yamalārju˚naka, m. du. two Arjuna trees (which obstructed the path of Kṛṣṇa, when a child, and were uprooted by him; afterwards personified as the enemies of Kṛṣṇa, and in the later mythology regarded as metamorphoses of Nala-kūbara and Maṇigrīva, two sons of Kubera),  R. ;  Hariv. ;  Pur.
